extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: Binding on ANY outcome: this is a G2-class formal/annotation DIAGNOSTIC over the SAME 84 self-authored kernel-v0-derived slots the g2 readout scored — never W1, never G4, no host model, no competitiveness sentence in any direction. Gold is the directive-#11 LLM proxy pair: every verdict is PROVISIONAL-ON-LLM-PROXY; the later two-human adjudicated panel is the sole authority for any permanent scientific adoption, and a proxy GO followed by a human-gold failure is governed by the human result (plan section 7.7 last row). A PASS licenses exactly: bounded promotion of the winning non-binding soft-preference shard (advisory rank/lint/explain only, outside hard closure, provenance exposed) — it does NOT license hard imported laws, identity changes, automatic bridge endorsement, Pi-replacement (open maintainer decision 10), gUFO claims (not loaded; separately gated), any statement about ontology correctness, or ANY feasibility conclusion about either programme thesis. A FAIL is symmetrically scoped: it kills the imported-soft-type fix AT THIS SCOPE (84 slots, this rendering, this proxy instrument), not foundational-ontology import as such. The 34/84 gate is a maintainer-ratified point-estimate ENGINEERING gate; no superiority claim of any statistical form is licensed even on PASS (Wilson/McNemar co-reported for honesty, not for licensing). Coverage disclosure, mandatory: kernel-expressibility coverage 0.3542 at rung molecules-v0, measured by m0b on one incomplete kernel-v0 instance — NOT general coverage. Baseline caveat inherited and restated: the frozen g2 33/84 readout is itself estimation-only (its own n>=500 gate unattainable on this corpus). Every verdict sentence names its licensing arm and carries the rider verbatim.
hypotheses: H-SOFT (load-bearing, the issue-#20 bet): replacing the hand-authored HARD universal 4-sort typing (the measured 0.39 over-constraint) with IMPORTED, explicitly SOFT BFO/SUMO/FrameNet type expectations over the SAME 84 slots raises blind ordinary-meaning soundness to at least 34/84 on the primary construction — the over-constraint is a property of the hard-law routing, not of typing as such. [rider: PROVISIONAL-ON-LLM-PROXY; same 84 self-authored kernel-v0 slots; point-estimate engineering gate; soft non-binding typing only; no feasibility conclusion]

H-SRC (secondary, source attribution): FrameNet valency evidence adds value over BFO+SUMO — read from the A3 vs A2 comparison; if only A2 passes the decision is GO-BFO-SUMO / NO-GO-FRAMENET pending redesign. [same rider]

H-BREADTH-NULL (anti-gaming control, equal prominence): broad foundational categories alone can appear sound by being vacuous — A1 (BFO-only) is the breadth/vacuity control; vacuous top-entity outputs score 0, and A1 can never authorize adoption regardless of its score. [same rider]

H-INSTRUMENT (premise, gated not hypothesised): the directive-#11 proxy pair remains a stable instrument on soft-modality statements — kappa >= 0.40, >= 90% decisive (the highest RT-4-decidable bar at n=84), deranged-sort soft-hedged probe false-satisfaction <= 0.30 per judge per arm; failure => INSTRUMENT-INVALID, never FAIL/PASS. [same rider]
kill_criterion_verbatim: ONT-TYPE-G2/1 kills (plan sections 7.5-7.7, fixed 84-slot denominator, vacuity-zeroed scoring, frozen baseline 33/84 — rider on every sentence): NO-GO-ONTOLOGY-IMPORT iff neither A2 nor A3 reaches 34/84 sound on the primary judge-pA construction — the imported soft type layer does NOT fix the g2 over-constraint and the type-layer-replacement direction of issue #20 dies at this scope (the hand-authored hard scheme stays demoted-to-lint per the g2 readout; rescue paths named IN the verdict: (i) human-gold re-adjudication of the SAME frozen package, (ii) a redesigned rendering under a NEW record, (iii) the annotation-only bridge WITHOUT g2 routing — none licensed by this record). NO-GO-VACUOUS iff A3 soundness passes but non-vacuous coverage < 67/84 overall or < 34/42 on R3 — breadth masquerading as soundness; treated as FAIL with equal prominence. A1 passing alone can NEVER authorize adoption (breadth control). INSTRUMENT-INVALID (kappa < 0.40, decisive < 95%, probe false-satisfaction > 0.30, pin drift, blinding hit) is no conclusion: repair and mint a new frozen run. Budget kill: reaching the 628-call ceiling or the $10 hard stop before complete labels stops WITHOUT partial scoring. Deflationary outcomes get equal prominence with any positive. Rider verbatim: PROVISIONAL-ON-LLM-PROXY; same 84 self-authored kernel-v0 slots; point-estimate engineering gate, not statistical superiority; soft non-binding typing only — never hard laws; no feasibility conclusion.
